sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13462" key="a)po/plunsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-πλυνσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleansing,</tr_> Sophon.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:96:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">96.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
